messages.author: dave_patel
messages.text: Checking. Looks like SSL handshake errors: 'certificate has expired or is not yet valid'. Investigating.

messages.author: bob_martinez
messages.text: I see it too. Could be related to recent deploy.

messages.author: dave_patel
messages.text: Found the issue: When the PR changed renewBefore from 30 days to 7 days, cert-manager re-evaluate.... Deploying fix.

messages.author: dave_patel
messages.text: Confirmed resolved. Writing up incident report.
